name: Fat Free Orange Poppy Seed Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine flour, sugar, poppy seeds, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, egg whites, orange zest, and orange juice concentrate. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix well.
4. On a floured surface, shape the dough into two logs, each about 14 inches long and 1 1/2 inches thick. Place the logs on a prepared baking sheet and bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
5. Transfer the logs to a cooling rack to cool completely.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 300°F.
7. Cut the logs diagonally into 1/2-inch-thick slices. Stand the slices upright on the baking sheet and bake for an additional 40 minutes.
8. Let the biscotti cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
